name: The Deep
oracleText:
The Deep, Waters Before Order enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{3}, {T}: Mill two cards, then return a land card from your graveyard to your hand.
flavorText: "And darkness was upon the face of the deep." — Genesis 1:2
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses the public-domain Wikimedia Commons file "The Deluge".
title: Waters Before Order
